# FuelEcon
> Plain-English fuel economy and trip cost calculators. Built for drivers who want clear answers without technical jargon.

## Core Micro-Tools
- [Trip Cost Calculator](https://fuelecon.pages.dev/): The hub tool. Enter distance, MPG, and gas price to see your total cost. Features a live "Green Zone" widget for efficiency scoring.
- [MPG ⇄ L/100km Converter](https://fuelecon.pages.dev/mpg-converter/): Instantly translate between US and International fuel economy units.
- [EV vs Gas Break-Even](https://fuelecon.pages.dev/ev-vs-gas/): Calculate if and when an electric vehicle pays for itself compared to a gasoline car.
- [Split Fuel Cost](https://fuelecon.pages.dev/split-fuel/): Simple tool for dividing road trip gas money between riders.
- [Commute Cost](https://fuelecon.pages.dev/commute-cost/): See what your daily drive actually costs you per week, month, and year.

## Key Data Sources
- **EPA (fueleconomy.gov)**: Source for vehicle MPG averages and historical trends.
- **EIA (eia.gov)**: Source for weekly retail gasoline price data in the United States.
- **OpenStreetMap / OSRM**: Used for route calculations and mapping.

## Why FuelEcon?
We focus on "Fuel Economy for Dummies." While other sites provide raw specs, we provide actionable advice like "Keeping your tires inflated can save you 3% at the pump." Every tool includes a "How it works" guide and AEO-optimized FAQs for instant answers.
